settings.title: Cilësimet
settings.following_settings_info: These settings only apply to the Following feed.
settings.update_email_desc: Please enter your new email address.
settings.change_password_desc: If you want to change your password, we will send a verification code to your email account.
settings.own_domain_desc: If you have your own domain, you can use it as your handle. This helps verify your identity.
settings.birthdate_private: This information is private and not shared with other users.
settings.export_data_desc: Your account archive contains all your public data including posts, media, and profile information. The archive is in CAR format and does not include private data like muted users or DMs.
settings.car_note: This feature is experimental. You can read more about exporting data in our blog.
settings.deactivate_account_desc: Your profile, posts, feeds, and lists will no longer be visible to other Bluesky users. You can reactivate your account at any time by logging in.
settings.deactivate_info: Deactivating account does not delete your data. If you want to delete your account permanently, use the Delete Account option.
settings.delete_account_desc: For security reasons, we need to send a confirmation code to your email address.
settings.delete_account_info: You can also temporarily deactivate your account, and reactivate it at any time.
settings.handle_same: This is already your current handle
settings.birthdate_future_error: Birthday cannot be in the future

language.title: Gjuha
language.app_language_desc: Zgjidhni një gjuhë për ndërfaqen e përdoruesit të aplikacionit.
language.primary_language_desc: Zgjidhni gjuhën tuaj të preferuar për përkthimet në feed-in tuaj.
language.content_languages_desc: Zgjidhni cilat gjuhë dëshironi që feed-et tuaja të përfshijnë. Nëse nuk zgjidhet asnjë, shfaqen të gjitha gjuhët.
language.km: ภาษาเขมร – Khmer
language.no_results: Nuk u gjet asnjë gjuhë që përputhet me "{{query}}"
language.modal_desc: Nëse nuk zgjidhet asnjë, të gjitha gjuhët do të shfaqen në burimet tuaja.

profile.user_not_found_desc: The user you're looking for doesn't exist or has been removed.
profile.blocked_by_desc: You cannot follow or see this user's posts.
profile.is_blocking_desc: You cannot see their posts or interact with them.

common.delete_post_confirm_message: This cannot be undone. The post will be removed from your profile, the timeline of any accounts that follow you, and from search results.

signalr.disconnected: SignalR Disconnected. Real-time updates may be delayed.

common.start_typing: Search for posts, users, or feeds

feeds.title: Feeds
feeds.my_feeds_desc: All your saved feeds in one place.
feeds.discover_new_desc: Choose your own feeds! Community-built feeds help you find the content you love.
feeds.no_posts_desc: This feed doesn't have any posts right now.
feeds.following_empty_recent: No recent posts from people you follow right now.
feeds.follow_more_cta: Follow more accounts to see more content.
feeds.discover_new_feeds_desc: Pick your own feeds! Community-built feeds help you find the content you love.
feeds.no_saved_feeds: You don't have any saved feeds.
feeds.no_pinned: You don't have any pinned feeds.
feeds.following_end: Follow more people to get more content...
feeds.feeds_guide: Feeds are custom algorithms that users build with a little coding expertise. See this guide for more information.
feeds.discover_description: Pick your own feeds! Community-built feeds help you find the content you love.
feeds.my_feeds_hint: Gozhdoni furnizimet për t'i shtuar ato në Faqja kryesore. Përdor cilësimet për porosi në Faqja kryesore.

lists.title: Lists
lists.create_desc: Lists allow you to see content from your favorite people.
lists.confirm_leave: Are you sure you want to leave this list?
lists.confirm_remove_member: Are you sure you want to remove this member?
lists.no_joined_lists: You haven't joined any lists yet.
lists.confirm_remove_post: Remove this post from the list?
lists.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this list?
lists.feed_end: No more posts in this list...
lists.feed_empty: No posts in this list yet.

moderation.title: Moderation
moderation.blocked_accounts_info: Blocked accounts cannot reply to your posts, mention you, or interact with you. You will not be able to see their content and they will not be allowed to see yours.
moderation.no_blocked_accounts: You haven't blocked any accounts. To block an account, go to their profile and select "Block account" from the menu on their account.
moderation.verification_info: Verification on Bluesky works by proving ownership of a domain. You can verify your identity by setting a DNS record or uploading a file to your website.
moderation.verification_dns_instruction: Add a TXT record to your domain's DNS configuration with the following name and value:
moderation.verification_http_instruction: Upload a file to your website at the following path with your DID as the content:
moderation.verification_failed: Verification failed. Please check your settings and try again.
moderation.interaction_info: These settings will be used as the default when you create a new post. You can edit them post-by-post from the composer.
moderation.block_confirm: Are you sure you want to block {{name}}? They will no longer be able to see your posts or interact with you.
moderation.unblock_confirm: Are you sure you want to unblock {{name}}?
moderation.mute_confirm: Are you sure you want to mute {{name}}? Their posts will no longer appear in your feeds.
moderation.unmute_confirm: Are you sure you want to unmute {{name}}?
moderation.muted_word_desc: Posts can be muted based on their text content, tags, or both. We recommend avoiding common words that appear in many posts, as it may result in no posts being shown.
moderation.no_muted_words: You haven't muted any words or tags
moderation.hide_completely_desc: Posts will be fully hidden from your feeds.
moderation.show_warning_desc: Posts will be shown with a warning overlay.
moderation.mod_lists_empty: Public, shareable lists of users for bulk muting or blocking.
moderation.list_desc_placeholder: e.g. Users that repeatedly reply with ads.
moderation.muted_accounts_info: Posts from muted accounts will be removed from your feeds and notifications. Muting is private.
moderation.no_muted_accounts: You haven't muted any accounts. To mute an account, go to their profile and select "Mute account" from the menu.
moderation.graphic_media_desc: Graphic media or potentially graphic content.
moderation.report_notice: Reports help us maintain a safe community. Our moderators will review this content.
moderation.details_placeholder: Tell us more about the issue...
moderation.content_hidden_desc: This content is hidden by your settings

privacy.title: Privacy and Security
privacy.2fa_modal_desc: Requires a code sent via email to login.
privacy.app_passwords_info: Use app passwords to sign in to other Bluesky apps without giving them your full account password.
privacy.app_password_modal_desc: Use this to sign in to other Bluesky apps along with your username.
privacy.app_password_modal_warning: Make sure to copy this password now. You won't be able to see it again. If you lose it, create a new one.
privacy.app_password_input_desc: Please enter a name for this app password or use a randomly generated one.
privacy.notify_posts: Allow others to be notified of your posts
privacy.notify_posts_desc: This feature allows users to receive notifications when you make a post. Turn off this feature to discourage other users from receiving notifications when you make a post.
privacy.logout_visibility_label: Discourage apps from showing my account to logged-out users
privacy.logout_visibility_desc: Bluesky will not show your profile and posts to logged-out users. Other apps may not honor this request. This does not make your account private.
privacy.logout_visibility_note: Note: Bluesky is an open and public network. This setting only limits the visibility of your content on the Bluesky app and website, and other apps may not respect this setting. Your content may still be shown to logged-out users by other apps and websites.
privacy.learn_more: Learn more about what is public on Bluesky.
privacy.learn_more_public: Learn more about what is public on Bluesky.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.likes_desc: Get notifications when people like your posts.
notifications.followers_desc: Get notifications when people follow you.
notifications.reply_desc: Get notifications when people reply to your posts.
notifications.mention_desc: Get notifications when people mention you in their posts.
notifications.quote_desc: Get notifications when people quote your posts.
notifications.repost_desc: Get notifications when people repost your posts.
notifications.activity_desc: Get notifications about activity from other users.
notifications.likes_reposts_desc: Get notifications when people like your reposts.
notifications.reposts_reposts_desc: Get notifications when people repost your reposts.
notifications.others_desc: Get notifications for other types of activity.
notifications.enabled_desc: Allow receiving notifications for this type
notifications.push_desc: Get push notifications on your device

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.font_family_desc: We recommend using theme fonts for the best experience.

explore.search_placeholder: Search for posts, users or feeds
explore.interests_desc: Your interests help us find what you like!
explore.no_posts_found: No trending posts found in the last 24 hours.
explore.no_more_posts: No more posts to discover right now.

login.error_generic: Login failed. Please check your credentials and try again.

signup.creating_on: You are creating an account on

signup.terms_agree: By creating an account, you agree to the {{terms}} and {{privacy}}.

messages.say_hello_desc: Send a message to start the conversation
messages.leave_confirm: Are you sure you want to leave this conversation? This action cannot be undone.
messages.confirm_delete_for_me: Are you sure you want to delete this message for yourself? It will remain visible to other participants.

chat_settings.title: Cilësimet e bisedës
chat_settings.allow_messages_from_desc: Zgjidhni kush mund të fillojë një bisedë me mesazh të drejtpërdrejtë me ju.
chat_settings.allow_ongoing_desc: Mund të vazhdoni bisedat e vazhdueshme, pavarësisht cilës cilësim zgjidhni.

search.title: Search
search.no_results_desc: Try searching for something else, or check for typos.
search.start_desc: Find posts and people on Bluesky.

post.replies_disabled: Replies are disabled for this post
post.alt_text_help: Alternative text describes images for people who are blind or have low vision, and helps add context for everyone.
post.discard_message: Are you sure you want to discard this draft?
post.muted_by_word: Post hidden by your muted word
post.giphy_key_missing: GIPHY API Key is missing. Please set REACT_APP_GIPHY_API_KEY in your .env file.
post.giphy_key_invalid: Invalid GIPHY API Key. Please check your REACT_APP_GIPHY_API_KEY.
post.not_found_desc: This post doesn't exist or is unavailable.
post.not_found_sub: It might have been deleted or the link is incorrect.

content.external_media_info: External media may allow websites to collect information about you and your device. No information is sent or requested until you press the "play" button.
content.my_interests_desc: The topics you choose help us bring you content you're interested in.

best_practices_list: Use titles that grab attention but aren't clickbait.
Target specific roles when the message isn't relevant to everyone.
Avoid sending too many broadcasts to prevent user fatigue.
